message:
test(doom/renderer): add 20 tests for BSP renderer coverage (bd-2ccd6)

Cover two-sided wall rendering (upper/lower portals), column clip
propagation, early exit when all columns solid, pitch offset, OOB
vertex/linedef/seg safety, background gradient correctness, direction=1
back-sector lookup, empty/1x1 maps, angle-dependent output, solid
count consistency, projection scaling, and resize clip state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
